reviews.review_description: Would have been great to make a full game of it. It would have been awesome, but it only lasted 5 minutes! Shame because it would have been awesome!

Yes it’s short and the soldiers following you makes it shorter as it doesn’t let you look around, but the graphics and mood are great, the shooting parts are fun though simple and the simple puzzles are actually well done. All in all I liked it a lot though it’s completed in about 10 minutes.
Wished there could be more of it. Its too nice
This game is amazing, it isn't too hard, kinda short but I still like it. Some intense jump scares sometimes and extremely fun
Get wrecked soldiers

reviews.review_title: this game rocks but too short
reviews.review_description: played well on the go, great graphics and easy to control only downside is it's too short.  really hope they make a full length tomb raider vr game cause this game rocks
I finished the game in 6 minutes but the game itself is very good
Nice demo
Great demo only 10mins. This is what vr games need but a full title. I would willing pay for a full vr tomb raider. Hope oculus and Facebook can take on the console games.

Great game and easy to manoeuvre around with the hand device.  Extremely realistic, you have to be thoughtful on how to work your way out of a jam and keep on the move otherwise you will die. If it was longer I would give it 5 stars.  So, slightly disappointed because of that.

reviews.review_title: Amazing VR experience, just too short
reviews.review_description: I was simply blown away by the graphics and quick gameplay that was offered in this download, and it's FREE. Visuals are literally top notch compared to most other experiences and the flashlight gives an eerie sense of realism. Highly recommend to show off to someone skeptical of VR and wants to learn more. If there is a full game like this, I would hands down pay for it.
It's pretty cool but it's short. I'd recommend it if you're a tomb raider fan!
Absolutely enjoyed it. Wish it was longer.

This game/experience is free, so I can't complain much, and the little it offered, I had a lot of fun with. The graphics and gameplay show off the near limits of what mobile VR is capable of. It's immersive and tense and just overall enjoyable. But at 10-15 minutes in length at the most, it just starts to excite you and then it ends. Let's hope for a follow up.
Needs more to it than just a run up

I loved this experience, it's really beautiful and impressive. I only wish it lasts longer! 
Congrats to the designers and developers.
It's fun but didn't know it was a trailer to a movie
This game was awesome, they need to make this a full length game. I'd buy in a second, awesome graphics..
good
One of the best! Very cool!
